recommendations.title: Happening
recommendations.overview: France, 1963. Anne is a bright young student with a promising future ahead of her. But when she falls pregnant, she sees the opportunity to finish her studies and escape the constraints of her social background disappearing. With her final exams fast

recommendations.title: Son of Frankenstein
recommendations.overview: One of the sons of late Dr. Henry Frankenstein finds his father's ghoulish creation in a coma and revives him, only to find out the monster is controlled by Ygor who is bent on revenge.

recommendations.title: Welcome Home Roscoe Jenkins
recommendations.overview: When a celebrated TV show host returns to his hometown in the South, his family is there to remind him that going home is no vacation!

recommendations.title: Girls Trip
recommendations.overview: Four girlfriends take a trip to New Orleans for an annual festival and, along the way, rediscover their wild sides and strengthen the bonds of sisterhood.

recommendations.title: A Moment to Remember
recommendations.overview: A young couple's love is tested when Sun-jin is diagnosed with a rare form of Alzheimer's disease.

recommendations.title: Roll Bounce
recommendations.overview: In the summer of 1978, a teenager and his group of friends face new challenges when their neighborhood roller-skating rink closes, forcing them to visit a different rink.

recommendations.title: The Best Man Holiday
recommendations.overview: When college friends reunite after 15 years over the Christmas holidays, they discover just how easy it is for long-forgotten rivalries and romances to be reignited.

recommendations.title: Operation Chromite
recommendations.overview: A squad of soldiers fight in the Korean War's crucial Battle of Incheon.

recommendations.title: Out of Time
recommendations.overview: Matt Lee Whitlock, respected chief of police in small Banyan Key, Florida, must solve a vicious double homicide before he himself falls under suspicion. Matt Lee has to stay a few steps ahead of his own police force and everyone he's trusted in order

recommendations.title: 71: Into the Fire
recommendations.overview: In August 1950, waiting for UN troops to arrive, the South Korean army assembled to protect Nakdong River. Only 71 student-soldiers are left behind to guard the city of Pohang. Now they are on a mission to defend the country from North Korean troops.
